query:
SELECT 
            gc.id, gc.name, gc.owner_id, gc.created_at,
            gcm.encrypted_group_key, gcm.muted,
            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_chat_members WHERE gc_id = gc.id) as member_count,
            m.ciphertext as last_message_ciphertext,
            m.created_at as last_message_at,
            m.sender_id as last_message_sender_id
        FROM group_chats gc
        JOIN group_chat_members gcm 
            ON gcm.gc_id = gc.id AND gcm.user_id = $1
        LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
            SELECT ciphertext, created_at, sender_id FROM messages
            WHERE gc_id = gc.id
            ORDER BY created_at DESC
            LIMIT 1
        ) m ON true
        ORDER BY m.created_at DESC NULLS LAST
